description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout and a large outdoor area. The front includes a double garage with wooden doors, a driveway, and a landscaped yard with trees and a patio. The rear of the house opens to a private garden with palm trees, a wooden deck, and a pergola-covered seating area. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and is situated adjacent to a paved street. The exterior materials include concrete, glass, wood, and metal, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, double garage, and landscaped outdoor spaces featuring trees, a deck, and a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entry, and landscaped yard with trees and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of glass windows, palm trees, and the open backyard with a wooden deck and pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the private garden, wooden deck, and the back facade with large sliding doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, flat roof, and the arrangement of outdoor living spaces and greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple modern door, no porch, with direct access from the driveway and minimal decorative elements.
